title: Neutrino masses and lepton mixing (PMNS)
statement: Neutrino masses (Dirac or Majorana via a seesaw) and the PMNS mixing matrix follow from the TECT lepton sector and the SO(10) right-handed-neutrino content.
scope: OPEN scaffold. Neutrino mass scale/ordering and PMNS mixing (pillar P6; GAP-3). The SO(10) $\mathbf{16}$ supplies the right-handed neutrino (links D1).
falsifier: A derived mass-squared splitting or PMNS angle incompatible with oscillation data after input freeze (GAP-3).
no_overclaim: Neutrino parameters are not derived; the seesaw realisation is the target.
next_action: Fix the right-handed-neutrino Majorana scale from the SO(10) breaking (D6) and extract the light-neutrino spectrum + PMNS.
